mainPage.heading: COMP DBD PLACE
mainPage.subtitle: Everything you need to know to start your way in competitive Dead by Daylight.

highlights.label: Big Leagues
highlights.desc: Biggest leagues, tournaments there are in the competitive DBD scene.

highlights.label: Build Crafting
highlights.desc: Make and share killer/survivor builds with automatic check for mistakes according to competitive rulesets.

highlights.label: Ranked
highlights.desc: Track your MMR, match history, and climb the solo/team queue ladder.

highlights.label: 1v1 Ladder
highlights.desc: One killer, one survivor. Climb the purest format in comp DBD.

highlights.label: Scrims
highlights.desc: Organize practice sessions against other competitive teams.

highlights.label: Major Teams
highlights.desc: Meet the organisations and rosters competing at the top of the comp DBD scene.

coming.label: Team Finder
coming.desc: Match with players who share your role, skill band, and schedule.

coming.label: Stats Central
coming.desc: Aggregated performance data across killers, maps, and competitive formats.

tournaments.title: Tournaments
tournaments.subtitle: Community-posted tournament announcements, open brackets, and organised events.

createTournament.title: Post a Tournament
createTournament.subtitle: Fill in the details below. Posts go through a quick moderation review before appearing publicly.
createTournament.bannerHint: Optional · max 4 MB · any common image format
createTournament.successSub: Your tournament ad has been sent for moderation. It will appear on the Tournaments page once approved.
createTournament.descPlaceholder: Format, dates, bracket size, sign-up link, prize pool...

errors.titleLength: Name must be 100 characters or fewer.
errors.descLength: Description must be 1200 characters or fewer.
errors.bannerSize: Image must be smaller than 4 MB.

moderation.title: Moderation
moderation.subtitle: Review tournament posts submitted by the community. Approve to publish, deny to reject, or delete permanently.
moderation.approveDesc: This post will be published on the Tournaments page.
moderation.denyDesc: This post will be rejected and hidden from the public feed.
moderation.deleteDesc: This post will be permanently removed and cannot be recovered.

bigLeagues.title: Big Leagues
bigLeagues.subtitle: High-stakes Dead by Daylight tournaments. Track brackets, VODs, standings, and team profiles for every comp event.

items.headline: DBDLeague
items.body: The premier competitive league for Dead by Daylight. Featuring top-tier teams, high-stakes matches, and comprehensive coverage of every seasons tournament action.

items.headline: Hens333 Tournament Series
items.body: Swiss group stage feeds into a single-elimination playoff. Streamer-friendly format with a focus on exciting matchups and upsets.

items.headline: Altruism league
items.body: A community-driven competitive format that emphasizes teamwork and strategic coordination over individual skill. Teams are matched based on their overall performance and commitment to the community.

items.headline: COTF
items.body: Champions of the Fog is a grassroots tournament series that has grown into a major fixture in the comp DBD scene. Known for its passionate community and high production values.

items.headline: Rasza official
items.body: Raszas official tournament series, featuring a mix of open qualifiers and invite-only events. Known for its high level of competition and engaging commentary.

dbdRanked.title: DBD Ranked
dbdRanked.subtitle: Compete in structured solo queue with transparent MMR, detailed match history, and seasonal leaderboards.

items.headline: Solo Queue Ladder
items.body: Ranked solo play with MMR-based matchmaking. Climb from Bronze to Grand Master across a 10-season competitive year. Season resets with soft rank decay.

items.headline: Match History & Stats
items.body: Detailed breakdowns of every ranked game: kills, escapes, hook counts, generator progression, and end-game score. Filterable by killer or survivor.

items.headline: MMR Transparency
items.body: See your hidden matchmaking rating alongside visible rank. Track how individual performance metrics affect MMR gain and loss per match.

items.headline: Peak Rank Profiles
items.body: Public player profiles display seasonal peak ranks, main roles, most-played killers, and recent performance trends.

items.headline: Leaderboards
items.body: Global and region-specific leaderboards updated every 24 hours. Compare your position among the top 1,000 players worldwide.

dbdScrims.title: DBD Scrims
dbdScrims.subtitle: Find opponents, schedule practice sessions, and build your team's structured competitive preparation regimen.

items.headline: Open Scrim Lobbies
items.body: Browse teams currently seeking opponents. Filter by region, skill band, and preferred killer pool. Join or post a scrim request in under 30 seconds.

items.headline: Scheduled Practice Blocks
items.body: Book recurring weekly slots with the same team for consistent structured practice. Automated reminders sent before each session.

items.headline: Custom Rule Sets
items.body: Run scrims under standard comp rules, relaxed ruleset, or create a custom ruleset for team-internal drills. Exported to easily share with opponents.

items.headline: Post-Scrim Review
items.body: Attach notes, screenshots, or VOD timestamps after each session. Build a review archive to track team-specific habits and counter-strategies.

items.headline: Team Roster Management
items.body: Manage your full five-player roster, substitutes, and roles. Invite players via username lookup or shareable link.

1v1Ladder.title: 1v1 DBD Ladder
1v1Ladder.subtitle: Solo killer versus solo survivor. Climb the most unforgiving format in competitive Dead by Daylight — no teammates, no excuses.

items.headline: 1v1 Format
items.body: One killer versus one survivor. Controlled map pool, fixed perk restrictions, and a best-of-three structure. Pure mechanics — no team coordination to hide behind.

items.headline: Ladder & Rankings
items.body: Earn MMR with every match. The ladder resets seasonally, with the top 32 players qualifying for the end-of-season invitational bracket.

items.headline: Map & Perk Ruleset
items.body: Agreed-upon map veto before each series. A curated ban list removes overperforming add-ons and offering stacks to keep results skill-dependent.

items.headline: Match Submission
items.body: Submit results via screenshot or short clip. Disputed outcomes are reviewed within 24 hours by a volunteer moderator panel.

items.headline: Hall of Fame
items.body: Seasonal champions and peak-rank holders are preserved in the Hall of Fame. Filter by killer main, region, or season number.

majorTeams.title: Major Teams
majorTeams.subtitle: Top 8 teams, they made to main stage of the biggest tournament of winter, DBDLeague Winter Circuit, and they are the best of the best, probably...
majorTeams.comingSoon: Full rosters and stats launching soon — stay tuned.

tutorials.title: Tutorials
tutorials.subtitle: Structured guides to sharpen every dimension of your competitive game — from fundamentals to frame-data deep dives.

items.headline: Killer Fundamentals
items.body: Core mechanics every competitive killer must master: patrol routing, mind-game techniques, pressure management, and map-specific strategies.

items.headline: Survivor Coordination
items.body: How to communicate efficiently with three teammates, split generator assignments, and execute last-minute escapes under pressure.

items.headline: Advanced Chase Techniques
items.body: Frame-perfect vaults, dead-hard timings, head-on setups, and looping strong tiles against top-tier killers. Annotated VOD clips included.

items.headline: Competitive Ruleset Primer
items.body: A complete breakdown of banned perks, add-ons, offerings, and map restrictions used across major tournaments. Required reading before entering any bracket.

items.headline: VOD Review Methodology
items.body: How to analyze your own film: what to look for, how to identify decision errors, and how to structure a productive post-game review session.

makeYourBuilds.title: Make Your Builds
makeYourBuilds.subtitle: Craft, compare, and share competitive loadouts. Explore perk synergies and community-vetted builds for every playstyle.

items.headline: Perk Synergy Tool
items.body: Select perks, add-ons, and offerings for any killer or survivor. The tool highlights known synergies and flags perk slot conflicts used in competitive rulesets.

items.headline: Meta Tier List
items.body: Community-driven tier rankings updated after each patch. Breaks down which perks are viable in tournament settings versus solo queue.

items.headline: Shared Build Library
items.body: Browse and clone builds submitted by top-ranked players. Filter by killer, role, playstyle, or tournament legality.

items.headline: Patch Tracker
items.body: Every balance change annotated with competitive impact ratings. Know immediately when a previously banned perk becomes tourney-legal.

items.headline: Submit Your Build
items.body: Share your loadout with the community. Attach a match replay or VOD clip demonstrating the build in action. Open for peer review.

auth.loginRequired: You must be logged in to access this page.
